items.title_zh: 豆包大模型日均Token突破120万亿，Seedance 2.0开放公测
items.summary_zh: 火山引擎：火山引擎宣布 Seedance 2.0 API 面向企业用户开放公测，具备版权与肖像安全保障机制。截至2026年3月，豆包大模型日均 Token 使用量突破120万亿，近三个月翻倍，较2024年5月发布时增长1000倍。火山引擎累计 Token 使用量超过1万亿的企业已从100家增至140家。

items.title_zh: AI营销废话指数
items.summary_en: Bastian Rieck (via Hacker News): A researcher introduces the 'AI Marketing BS Index,' a humorous yet critical metric quantifying buzzword density and substance deficit in AI product marketing claims. The post scores real announcements, highlighting the industry tendency toward hyperbolic language over meaningful technical communication.
items.summary_zh: Bastian Rieck（Hacker News）：一位研究者提出 AI 营销废话指数，用于量化 AI 产品营销中的流行词密度与内容空洞程度。该帖对真实发布公告进行打分，揭示行业在夸大宣传语言与有价值技术沟通之间的失衡问题。

items.title_zh: 开源路由插件ClawXRouter：Agent云端本地协同成本降58%
items.summary_zh: 清华THUNLP/中国人民大学/面壁智能：清华大学 THUNLP 实验室、中国人民大学、AI9Stars、面壁智能与 OpenBMB 联合发布开源端云协同 AI 智能体路由插件 ClawXRouter。该插件在本地模型与云端 API 之间智能调度：简单任务本地运行、敏感数据本地脱敏、复杂任务交由云端，实验数据显示综合成本降低58%，同时保护数据隐私。

items.title_en: Show HN: Real-time dashboard for Claude Code agent teams
items.title_zh: 实时仪表盘用于监控 Claude Code 智能体团队
items.summary_en: simple10 (via Hacker News): An open-source real-time observability dashboard for teams running multiple Claude Code agents simultaneously. The tool provides live visibility into agent status, task queues, and code outputs, addressing the growing need for multi-agent orchestration tooling.
items.summary_zh: simple10（Hacker News）：一款开源实时可观测仪表盘，适用于同时运行多个 Claude Code 智能体的团队。该工具提供智能体状态、任务队列和代码输出的实时视图，回应了多智能体编排工具日益增长的需求。

items.title_en: Gemma 4: Byte for byte, the most capable open models
items.title_zh: Gemma 4 发布：最高性价比开源模型
items.summary_en: Google DeepMind: Google DeepMind introduced Gemma 4, its most capable open model family to date. Built on Gemini 3 technology, Gemma 4 supports advanced reasoning, agentic workflows, multimodal input, and 140 languages. Released under Apache 2.0 license, available across multiple model sizes optimized for different hardware.
items.summary_zh: Google DeepMind：Google DeepMind 发布 Gemma 4，基于 Gemini 3 研究构建，是目前最智能的开源模型家族。支持高级推理、智能体工作流、多模态输入及 140 种语言，以 Apache 2.0 授权发布，提供多个尺寸适配不同硬件。

items.title_en: Emotion Concepts and Their Function in a Large Language Model
items.title_zh: 大语言模型中的情绪概念及其功能：Anthropic 可解释性新研究
items.summary_en: Anthropic: Anthropic researchers published interpretability findings showing that Claude possesses internal representations of emotion-like concepts that causally influence its behavior. The research maps how features resembling emotions such as frustration, curiosity, and calm modulate the model's outputs, advancing mechanistic understanding of LLM internals.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic：Anthropic 研究人员发表可解释性研究成果，揭示 Claude 内部存在类情绪概念表征，并对其行为产生因果影响。研究描绘了挫败感、好奇心、平静等类情绪特征如何调节模型输出，深化了对大语言模型内部机制的理解。

items.title_zh: Qwen3.6-Plus 发布：面向真实场景的 Agent 能力大模型
items.summary_en: Hacker News: Alibaba released Qwen3.6-Plus, the latest iteration of its Qwen model series, with a focus on real-world agentic capabilities. The model is designed for complex multi-step tasks, improved tool use, and stronger reasoning in practical deployment scenarios.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：阿里巴巴发布 Qwen3.6-Plus，主打面向真实场景的 Agent 能力。该模型专为复杂多步骤任务设计，具备更强的工具调用能力和实际部署场景下的推理性能。

items.title_en: Codex now offers pay-as-you-go pricing for teams
items.title_zh: OpenAI Codex 推出按需计费团队方案
items.summary_en: OpenAI: OpenAI introduced pay-as-you-go pricing for Codex-only seats in ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, removing fixed seat fees and billing on token consumption instead. ChatGPT Business annual pricing drops from $25 to $20 per seat. Teams with new Codex-only members receive up to $500 in credits. Over 2 million builders use Codex weekly, with Codex users inside Business and Enterprise growing 6x since January.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：OpenAI 为 ChatGPT Business 和 Enterprise 的 Codex 独立席位推出按需计费方案，取消固定席位费、改按 Token 消耗计费。ChatGPT Business 年费从 25 美元降至 20 美元/席位，新增席位可获最高 500 美元额度奖励。目前每周超 200 万开发者使用 Codex，企业版用户自 1 月以来增长 6 倍。

items.title_en: Meet the new Cursor: Cursor 3, a unified workspace for building software with agents
items.title_zh: Cursor 3 发布：面向智能体的统一开发工作区
items.summary_en: Cursor: Cursor launched Cursor 3, a ground-up redesign of its IDE built around agents rather than individual file editing. The new interface supports multi-repo layouts, parallel local and cloud agent management, seamless handoff between environments, and integrates with Slack, GitHub, and Linear. Cloud agents produce demos and screenshots for verification. Users can switch back to the legacy Cursor IDE at any time.
items.summary_zh: Cursor：Cursor 发布 Cursor 3，从零重建以智能体为核心的开发工作区，支持多仓库布局、本地与云端智能体并行管理、无缝切换，并与 Slack、GitHub、Linear 集成。云端智能体会生成演示和截图供开发者确认，用户也可随时切回旧版 Cursor IDE。

items.title_zh: 中国最强编程模型来了！阿里Qwen3.6-Plus性能直逼Claude，国产大模型杀入决赛圈
items.summary_zh: 量子位：阿里发布 Qwen3.6-Plus 新一代基座大模型，支持 1M 上下文，具备原生多模态理解和推理能力，在编程和 Agent 任务上超越参数量两至三倍的多款国产模型。在涵盖智能体编程和真实世界任务的多项权威评测中，Qwen3.6-Plus 成为最接近 Claude 系列的国产模型，后续将开源更多尺寸并发布旗舰版 Qwen3.6-Max。

items.title_en: CUDA Tile Programming Now Available for BASIC
items.title_zh: CUDA Tile编程支持BASIC语言
items.summary_en: NVIDIA: NVIDIA has announced that CUDA Tile programming is now available for the BASIC programming language, expanding GPU programming accessibility to developers using BASIC. The feature enables GPU-accelerated computation through familiar BASIC syntax.
items.summary_zh: NVIDIA：NVIDIA 宣布 CUDA Tile 编程现已支持 BASIC 编程语言，将 GPU 编程能力扩展至 BASIC 开发者群体，使其能够通过熟悉的 BASIC 语法实现 GPU 加速计算。

items.title_en: AI can push your Stream Deck buttons for you
items.title_zh: AI自动操控Stream Deck按键
items.summary_en: Elgato: Elgato has released an update to Stream Deck that integrates AI agent capabilities via MCP (Model Context Protocol), allowing AI agents to programmatically trigger Stream Deck actions and button presses without manual user input.
items.summary_zh: Elgato：Elgato 发布 Stream Deck 更新，通过 MCP（Model Context Protocol）集成 AI 智能体能力，允许 AI 代理自动触发 Stream Deck 按钮操作，无需用户手动输入。

items.title_en: AI can push your Stream Deck buttons for you
items.title_zh: AI 可为你自动触发 Stream Deck 按钮
items.summary_en: The Verge: Elgato's Stream Deck 7.4 software update introduces MCP (Model Context Protocol) support, enabling AI assistants to discover and activate Stream Deck actions on behalf of users. The update bridges AI agent workflows directly with physical shortcut hardware, opening new automation possibilities.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：Elgato 发布 Stream Deck 7.4 软件更新，引入 MCP（模型上下文协议）支持，允许 AI 助手自动识别并触发 Stream Deck 操作，将 AI 智能体工作流与物理快捷键硬件直接打通，拓展了自动化使用场景。

items.title_zh: 为啥武汉无人车也呆了一次
items.summary_zh: 量子位：3月31日晚，武汉萝卜快跑无人驾驶车在市区停摆，乘客安全疏散，无人员伤亡。据知情人士透露，停摆系车辆自检到潜在风险后主动触发的安全策略，而非系统故障。文章深入分析了自动驾驶系统的安全逻辑，并与 Waymo 此前停摆事件作对比，探讨安全停车机制的必要性与公众认知差距。

items.title_en: Baidu's robotaxis froze in traffic, creating chaos
items.title_zh: 百度自动驾驶车队集体停滞引发混乱
items.summary_en: Baidu: Multiple Baidu Apollo robotaxis simultaneously froze in traffic in Wuhan, China, blocking intersections and creating significant traffic chaos. The incident highlights ongoing challenges for autonomous vehicles in complex urban traffic scenarios.
items.summary_zh: 百度：中国武汉多辆百度 Apollo 自动驾驶出租车同时在交通路口停滞，阻塞道路并造成严重交通混乱，暴露了自动驾驶车辆在复杂城市场景下的系统性挑战。

items.title_en: Baidu's robotaxis froze in traffic, creating chaos
items.title_zh: 百度 Apollo 无人车集体停摆，引发交通混乱
items.summary_en: The Verge: Baidu Apollo Go robotaxis froze in traffic in Wuhan, China, forcing passengers to exit stranded vehicles and creating significant traffic disruption. Authorities and Baidu staff responded quickly; no injuries were reported. The incident echoes a similar Waymo fleet-wide stoppage and raises questions about autonomous vehicle safety protocols.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：百度旗下 Apollo Go 无人驾驶出租车在武汉市区集体停摆，乘客被迫步行离车，交通一度受阻。交管部门与百度工作人员迅速处置，无人员伤亡。此事件与数月前 Waymo 停摆事件高度相似，引发外界对自动驾驶安全机制的广泛讨论。

items.title_zh: 国内最强生图模型Wan2.7-Image来了
items.summary_zh: 量子位：Wan 团队发布 Wan2.7-Image，具备文生图、图生组图、图像指令编辑和交互式编辑全链路能力。人类偏好盲测中文生图能力超越 GPT-Image1.5 及国内主流模型，文本渲染与照片级成像指标接近顶尖水准，并强化了虚拟形象定制功能，支持骨相、眼眸到五官全方位捏脸。

items.title_en: Art schools are being torn apart by AI
items.title_zh: AI 正在撕裂艺术学校
items.summary_en: The Verge: Generative AI is creating deep divisions at art and design schools, threatening career prospects of graduates in creative fields. Students at CalArts and other institutions have staged protests against AI use in coursework, reflecting a growing cultural clash between traditional creative education and AI-generated work.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：生成式 AI 正在艺术与设计院校中引发深刻分裂，创意专业毕业生就业前景受到严重威胁。CalArts 等高校学生发起抗议，反对在课程中使用 AI，折射出传统创意教育与 AI 生成内容之间日益激化的文化冲突。

items.title_zh: Anthropic被逼急了！亲生龙虾意外曝光，Karpathy：这就是Claude Claw
items.summary_zh: 量子位：Anthropic 内部吉祥物龙虾形象意外曝光，知名 AI 研究者 Andrej Karpathy 评论称其正是 Claude Claw。此次曝光源于 Claude Code 源码泄露事件，进一步揭示了 Anthropic 内部品牌与产品规划细节。

items.title_en: Claude Code Unpacked: A visual guide
items.title_zh: Claude Code 深度拆解：图解指南
items.summary_en: Hacker News: A community-created visual guide unpacking Claude Code's architecture, internals, and usage patterns. The resource gained significant traction on Hacker News, reflecting strong developer interest in understanding and extending Anthropic's AI coding agent.
items.summary_zh: Hacker News：一份由社区创作的 Claude Code 可视化拆解指南，深入解析其架构、内部机制与使用方式，在 Hacker News 获得广泛关注，反映出开发者对 Anthropic AI 编程智能体的高度兴趣。
